title: Two Sum
content: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target
examples: return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.
conditions: ["You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution","You may not use the same element twice"]
cases: ["The array is non-empty","There is exactly one solution"]

title: Valid Parentheses
content: Given a string s containing just the characters '('
type: determine if the input string is valid.
column11: ["Open brackets must be closed by the same type of brackets","Open brackets must be closed in the correct order"]
